critic.verdict: An incredibly clean, rhythmic, and physically satisfying chart with textbook-perfect lane flow and structural progression.

issues.problem: Complete lack of sustain holds, which could have been used to anchor the long background synth pads in the intro or drop.
The chart ends abruptly at 31.19s, leaving the last 2.8 seconds of the outro entirely unmapped during the song's final fadeout.

design_notes: The chart utilizes a highly structured layout tailored for Overdrive difficulty. In the Intro (S0), the map establishes a steady rhythm with clear alternating lane movement on main beats (BAR for kicks, alternating GAP/NOTE for snares), creating a fluid driving flow. S1 (Drop) spikes the intensity by introducing sweeping 3-note runs at 0.25 beat subdivisions to trace the energetic synth leads. The Outro (S2) sustains this peak momentum with a continuous zig-zag cascade across all three lanes, ensuring a highly satisfying climax before the track resolves.

design_sections.name: Intro
design_sections.intent: Introduce basic alternating pulse on main kicks and snares.

design_sections.name: Drop
design_sections.intent: Escalate energy with quick 3-note sweeps and highly syncopated runs.

design_sections.name: Outro
design_sections.intent: Climax with a continuous sweeping zig-zag pattern to the finish.
